title: Conagra stock jumps toward near 6-year high as higher prices lead to earnings beat, raised outlook
text: Shares of Conagra Brands Inc. CAG, -0.46% jumped 4.5% toward a near six-year high after the branded food company, with brands including Birds Eye, Healthy Choice and Reddi-wip, reported fiscal second-quarter profit and sales that rose above expectations and boosted its full-year outlook, as raised prices helped offset a decline in volume. Net income for the quarter to Nov. 27 rose to $381.9 million, or 79 cents a share, from $275.5 million, or 57 cents a share, in the year-ago period.
